name: Creekside Golf Course
about: Creekside Golf Course is a nine-hole golf course and practice facility in Seymour, Tennessee. It offers a pleasurable challenge for every skill level and is known for its comfortable and fun environment for quick rounds or skill development. The venue features a new golf simulator, perfect for rainy or winter days, and hosts weekly activities, tournaments, and various events. It is centrally located within 15 minutes of Knoxville, Maryville, and Sevierville.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient simulator for year-round play regardless of weather
Central location near major Tennessee cities
Supportive environment suitable for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site
No mention of alcohol service available on-site

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players are required to have their own clubs to play on the course.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of a BYOB policy or food service on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Creekside is a nine-hole course, allowing for a quick and satisfying round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly with activities for all ages, though the minimum age is 2 years old.
